description_long: This is a stylized doll with a youthful appearance, featuring large, expressive purple eyes and long, dark hair styled into twin ponytails with pink bows at the ends. The doll is dressed in a white short-sleeved blouse with pink trim and a matching white skirt adorned with a pink hem and a black belt. The outfit is accessorized with a pink hair clip, a bracelet, and white socks paired with black Mary Jane shoes. The doll's skin tone is medium brown, and the facial features are soft and rounded, giving it a friendly and approachable look. The overall design is reminiscent of Japanese anime or manga characters, with a focus on cute and fashionable aesthetics. The materials and finish suggest a smooth, semi-soft plastic construction typical of collectible or play dolls.
description: A cute, anime-inspired doll with long dark twin ponytails, a white and pink outfit, and expressive purple eyes. The doll features detailed accessories and a smooth, semi-soft plastic finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's face, detailed blouse, skirt, and both ponytails with pink bows clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length and volume of the hair, the profile of the face, and the side of the dress and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the twin ponytails, both pink bows, and the back of the dress and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the hair's flow, the profile, and the side details of the outfit and shoes.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll wears a white short-sleeved blouse with pink trim and star patterns, a matching white skirt with a pink hem, a black belt, and white socks with black Mary Jane shoes. The style is reminiscent of Japanese kawaii fashion, with pastel accents and cute, coordinated accessories.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with arms slightly extended outward, legs straight and close together, and head facing forward. The posture is static and symmetrical, typical of display or play dolls.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral with large, wide-open purple eyes, slightly arched eyebrows, and a small, closed mouth, conveying a calm and friendly demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight, dark brown hair styled into twin ponytails secured with pink bows, with a single upward curl at the top and a pink hair clip on the left side.
